Headquartered globally, VB® Group is committed to supporting industries in navigating the complexities of the digital age through high\\-tech innovation and strategic expertise.

title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
description:
**Overview:** 




 At Intuit, we are a mission\\-driven, global financial technology platform dedicated to powering prosperity around the world. We serve approximately 100 million consumers, small businesses, and self\\-employed individuals through our ecosystem of iconic products: TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and Mailchimp. As a Senior Staff Software Engineer, you are not just building software; you are architecting the engine for our customers' financial success.
 



 Our organization is built on a foundation of customer obsession and data\\-driven innovation. You will be at the heart of an engineering culture that is transforming itself to be an AI\\-driven expert platform. title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. Renowned for its innovative approach, Turing specializes in developing cutting\\-edge AI systems that revolutionize how software is built, tested, and deployed. The company prides itself on fostering a dynamic and inclusive work environment that encourages creativity, collaboration, and continuous learning. With a global presence and a commitment to excellence, Turing is at the forefront of AI research and development, partnering with industry leaders to shape the future of intelligent software solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role involves contributing to the creation of verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repository histories, utilizing a synthetic, human\\-in\\-the\\-loop approach. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in analyzing and working with high\\-quality open\\-source projects, particularly those hosted on GitHub. Your responsibilities will include automating development environments, triaging issues, and assessing test coverage and quality to ensure the robustness of our datasets. This position offers an excellent opportunity to impact AI research directly and work alongside a talented team of engineers and researchers.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering.
* Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby.
* Strong understanding of version control systems, particularly Git, and containerization tools like Docker.
* Experience with setting up, configuring, and automating development environments.
* Ability to navigate and understand complex codebases.
* Hands\\-on experience running, modifying, and testing real\\-world projects locally.
* Experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is a plus.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open\\-source libraries to identify challenging tasks for LLMs.
* Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup, to facilitate testing and evaluation.
* Evaluate unit test coverage and quality to ensure dataset reliability and comprehensiveness.
* Modify and run codebases locally to assess the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code understanding tasks.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that present meaningful challenges for LLMs.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative and innovative team environment.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible environment that promotes work\\-life balance. You will be part of a pioneering team working on some of the most exciting projects in AI and software engineering. The role provides exposure to cutting\\-edge research and development, with opportunities to contribute to impactful solutions that shape the future of AI\\-assisted software development. Additionally, Turing supports professional growth through continuous learning opportunities, networking with industry experts, and participation in innovative projects that challenge and expand your skill set.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team fosters innovation and drives success, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join us in shaping the future of AI technology.

 As a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET), you will play a pivotal role in the software development lifecycle by actively participating in release cycle planning, conducting thorough testing, identifying, and communicating requirements gaps, and contributing to the continuous improvement of our data products. You will collaborate with developers to understand requirements and design comprehensive test strategies. **About Us:** 




 Dozti is a private holding company with interests across technology, infrastructure, consumer markets, and emerging industries. We build internal platforms, operational systems, and client\\-facing tools that power our professional services and portfolio companies. Our focus is on durable systems, clean architecture, and long\\-term maintainability rather than short\\-lived prototypes.
 



  





**Job Description:** 




 As a Full\\-Stack Developer at Dozti, you will work on designing, building, and maintaining core application systems with a strong emphasis on backend architecture and platform reliability. While you will contribute to frontend features when needed, your primary responsibility will be owning backend services, APIs, data models, and integrations that support our internal and client\\-facing systems.This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys thinking about data flow, system boundaries, and long\\-term scalability \\- not just UI implementation. You will collaborate closely with product, operations, and marketing teams to translate business needs into robust technical solutions.
 



  





**Responsibilities:**



* Design, build, and maintain backend services, APIs, and application logic.
* Own database schemas, migrations, and data integrity across systems.
* Implement authentication, authorization, and role\\-based access controls.
* Build integrations with third\\-party APIs, internal tools, and external platforms.
* Develop background jobs, async workflows, and automation processes.
* Collaborate with frontend developers to define clean interfaces between client and server.
* Write clear, maintainable, and well\\-structured code with an emphasis on reliability.
* Monitor, debug, and improve performance, scalability, and system stability.
* Participate in architecture decisions and technical planning.



  





**Requirements:**



* 3\\+ years of experience as a full\\-stack or backend\\-focused software engineer.
* Strong experience building backend applications using modern frameworks and languages.
* Solid understanding of relational databases, data modeling, and SQL.
* Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs.
* Familiarity with authentication, authorization, and security best practices.
* Comfort working with cloud environments and deployment workflows.
* Ability to reason about system design, tradeoffs, and failure scenarios.
* Clear written and verbal communication skills.



  





**Nice\\-to\\-Have Skills:**



* Experience with background processing, queues, or event\\-driven systems.
* Exposure to DevOps concepts such as CI/CD, monitoring, and logging.
* Familiarity with frontend frameworks (React, Next.js, or similar) for feature implementation.
* Experience working in professional services or multi\\-client environments.
* Understanding of performance optimization and scaling strategies.



  





**What We Offer:**



* Ownership of core backend systems that directly support business operations.
* Opportunity to work on real production systems with long\\-term impact.
* Fully remote work environment with autonomy and accountability.
* Competitive compensation based on experience and technical depth.
* Long\\-term growth opportunities as Dozti expands its internal platforms and services.
* A culture focused on clarity, responsibility, and engineering discipline.



  





**How to Apply:**

 **backend systems, APIs, and data\\-driven applications**

description:
**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking a Senior Software Development Engineer who is
 **highly hands\\-on and actively involved in day\\-to\\-day coding, in addition to contributing to system design and architectural discussions.** 




  





 This role is suited for engineers who enjoy writing production\\-quality code on a daily basis, taking ownership of complex backend components, and solving non\\-trivial technical problems through
 



 implementation not just high\\-level design. The ideal candidate combines strong design thinking with deep, practical coding expertise in building and evolving backend systems at scale.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, implement, and maintain backend services through hands\\-on coding on a daily basis using Node.js and TypeScript (Nest.js or equivalent frameworks).
* Spend the majority of time on hands\\-on implementation, including writing, refactoring, and optimizing production code.
* Own end\\-to\\-end delivery of backend components, from design to implementation, testing, and production support.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code, with a strong focus on correctness and performance.
* Actively contribute code to complex problem areas such as data access layers, service integrations, and asynchronous workflows.
* Participate in architectural discussions while remaining deeply involved in the actual implementation of solutions.
* Review code to uphold high engineering standards and provide actionable, technical feedback.
* Design and evolve data models and storage strategies using relational and non\\-relational databases.
* Optimize database queries and access patterns through hands\\-on tuning and refactoring.
* Build and integrate asynchronous and message\\-driven components using modern messaging or streaming platforms.
* Develop and operate services in containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes.
* Collaborate closely with frontend, platform, and product teams to deliver robust backend solutions.



  





**Core Requirements** 



* **8\\+ years of backend development experience, with a strong emphasis on hands\\-on coding in production systems.**
* **Demonstrated ability to design and write high\\-quality code independently, not just review or propose designs.**
* **Strong proficiency in Node.js and TypeScript, with proven experience building non\\-trivial backend services.**
* **Solid understanding of software design principles and system architecture, backed by real implementations.**
* **Experience designing and implementing distributed systems and microservices.**
* **Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases, including hands\\-on schema design and query optimization.**
* Experience implementing asynchronous processing, messaging systems, or event\\-driven architectures.
* Hands\\-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Ability to balance hands\\-on implementation with system\\-level thinking.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and ability to work effectively in complex, fast\\-paced environments.



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience with additional backend languages such as Go or Python.
* Familiarity with workflow orchestration, background processing, or scheduling systems.
* Understanding of API security, authentication, and authorization mechanisms.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
* Exposure to high\\-throughput or data\\-intensive systems.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Qualcomm is a global leader in the semiconductor and telecommunications equipment industry, renowned for its innovation in wireless technology. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing advanced chipsets, software solutions, and technologies that power a wide range of connected devices. With a strong focus on research and development, Qualcomm continuously pushes the boundaries of what is possible in mobile, IoT, automotive, and edge computing sectors. Its commitment to innovation and excellence has established Qualcomm as a trusted partner for leading technology companies worldwide, enabling the next generation of connected experiences and digital transformation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer to join our dynamic Generative AI team at Qualcomm. In this role, you will be instrumental in developing and deploying cutting\\-edge AI inference solutions on Qualcomm chipsets. Your primary focus will be on optimizing large language models (LLMs), large vision models (LVMs), and other generative AI frameworks to operate efficiently on edge devices. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams including hardware, system architecture, and test engineering to design, implement, and validate high\\-performance software solutions that leverage Qualcomm's heterogeneous computing capabilities. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the evolution of AI at the edge, enabling intelligent applications to run seamlessly on mobile and embedded devices, thereby reducing reliance on cloud infrastructure and enhancing user privacy and experience.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong educational background in computer science, engineering, or related fields, complemented by extensive hands\\-on experience in software development. A minimum of 6 years of relevant experience is required, with proficiency in C/C\\+\\+, Python, and a deep understanding of AI models, especially generative models such as LLMs, LVMs, and transformers. Candidates should have a solid grasp of floating\\-point and fixed\\-point representations, quantization techniques, and optimization strategies for hardware accelerators like CPU, GPU, and NPU. Familiarity with frameworks such as PyTorch, TFLite, and ONNX Runtime, as well as experience with parallel computing languages like CUDA and OpenCL, will be advantageous. Strong analytical, debugging, and communication skills are essential for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Software Engineer in the Generative AI team at Qualcomm, your core responsibilities will include spearheading the development, optimization, and deployment of the Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) SDK on Qualcomm System\\-on\\-Chips (SoCs). You will focus on pushing the performance boundaries of large AI models, ensuring they operate efficiently and effectively on edge devices. Your expertise in deploying large C/C\\+\\+ software stacks will be critical in creating scalable and reliable solutions. You will stay abreast of the latest advancements in generative AI, including understanding the intricacies of large language models, vision models, and transformer architectures, and applying this knowledge to real\\-world product development. Collaboration across global teams, participating in code reviews, and ensuring best practices in software development will be key aspects of your role. Additionally, you will contribute to the research and implementation of optimization techniques such as quantization, model pruning, and hardware\\-specific acceleration to maximize inference speed and energy efficiency.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Qualcomm offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of its employees. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, retirement plans, and paid time off. Employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, career development programs, and a collaborative work environment that fosters innovation. Qualcomm also promotes a healthy work\\-life balance through flexible working arrangements and wellness initiatives. Being part of Qualcomm means contributing to transformative technologies that impact billions of lives worldwide, with opportunities for recognition and advancement within a global organization committed to excellence and innovation.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Qualcomm is an equal opportunity employer that values diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We are committed to providing a work environment free from discrimination and harassment, where all employees are treated with respect and dignity. We welcome applicants of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, age, disability, sexual orientation, or other protected characteristics. If you require any accommodations during the application or interview process, Qualcomm is dedicated to providing accessible support to ensure equal participation. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our innovation and ability to serve our global customers effectively.
